name: Transportation and Economic Corridors
blurb: Plans, builds, operates, and maintains Alberta's highway network, trade corridors, water infrastructure, and municipal transportation -- connecting communities and enabling economic growth.

name: Assisted Living and Social Services
blurb: Supports Albertans through employment supports, disability supports, prevention of elder abuse, community well-being, housing stability, health benefits, and financial assistance programs.

name: Justice
blurb: Ensures a fair and accessible justice system for all Albertans -- administering courts, prosecuting criminal offences, resolving family disputes, enforcing support orders, overseeing legal aid, registering land titles, and supporting victims of crime.
